domain: Karen backstrap loom weaving (Burma/Thailand; warp-faced tabby with supplementary weft yarns; warp threads tensioned vertically, weft passes horizontally; pattern from warp-weft cross-binding without disturbing warp)
specific_mechanism: Dual-level orthogonal adapter: low-rank update B constrained to left-null-space of pre-trained W's top-K SVD, AND adapter activation update orthogonal to warp activation directions.
llm_application: KAREN-WEFT-NULL: dual-level null-space orthogonal LoRA. New-task low-rank update matrix B is constrained to span only the LEFT NULL SPACE of pre-trained W's top-K SVD components (warp directions); SIMULTANEOUSLY adapter output activations are constrained to be orthogonal to warp-task activation directions via projection P_a = I - sum_warp a_i a_i^T applied at adapter output. The 'weft' passes orthogonal to 'warp' at BOTH parameter and activation levels. Differs from LoRA-Null 2503.02659 (null space of ACTIVATIONS only), Null-LoRA 2512.15233 (null space of weights only), OPLoRA 2510.13003 (one-sided projection on weight), CLoRA (pre-defined subspace) by combining DUAL-LEVEL orthogonality (parameter null-space AND activation orthogonality simultaneously).
novelty_claim: LoRA-Null + Null-LoRA + OPLoRA + OLieRA + CLoRA mature null-space adapter literature. KAREN-WEFT-NULL recombines parameter + activation null-space constraints. Recombination of existing components.
